topic.what: Dependencies in polynomial convolution causing underestimation of decryption failure rates in module-lattice schemes
topic.how: Norm-wise decomposition separates outer-radius terms (coefficient-wise) from inner-diagonal-energy terms (convolution-induced). Identifies dependency carriers via inner distortion statistics and proposes trimming countermeasures.
topic.why_matters: Independence-based DFR estimates used in LAC/DAWN/FHE can be optimistic in rare-event regime; convolution-induced dependencies cause systematic underestimation, enabling failure-based CCA attacks.

characteristics.what_it_measures: Probability of decryption failure under ECC decoding
characteristics.vs_baseline: trimming reduces DFRdep,heur by 20+ orders of magnitude in TrimDAWN
characteristics.evidence: Table 5 shows log2(DFRdep,heur) dropping from -98 to -133 at NIST-V with moderate trimming
characteristics.context: TrimDAWN achieves below 2^-133 at 31-37% overhead; TrimLAC achieves 2^-121 at 1982% overhead

characteristics.what_itasures: Runtime overhead from rejection sampling during keygen/encapsulation
characteristics.evidence: Table 5 reports TrimDAWN 31-37%, TrimLAC 85-1982% depending on strictness
characteristics.context: Trade-off between DFR reduction and computational cost; stricter bounds incur higher overhead

characteristics.what_it_measures: Bound Binner on ||(a¯a)[1:n/2)||_inf used for rejection sampling
characteristics.evidence: Section 5.2 Table 5 uses Binner tuples (36,36,40) for LAC, (32,28,36) for stricter trim
characteristics.context: Calibrated per security level; tighter bounds suppress more dependency outliers

characteristics.what_it_measures: Empirical discrepancy between polynomial-product and i.i.d. matrix squared norms
characteristics.evidence: Figure 3 from 2^32 samples shows polynomial products exhibit substantially heavier right tail than independence model predicts
characteristics.context: Demonstrates that matching one-coordinate marginals does not control joint tail for N_delta events

characteristics.what_it_measures: Proxy tail signal improvement for failure-finding under fixed Hamming weight
characteristics.evidence: Section 4 experiment: inner-distortion selector produced 64 exceedances vs 43 for continuous-run selector under same 2^18 search budget
characteristics.context: Proxy statistic N_delta>=3 used for measurement; 18% improvement in ECC failure probability under matched search budget
